description: Create a 120mm tall twisted hexagonal pedestal solid in FreeCAD. The base profile at Z=0 must be a regular hexagon with a 40mm circumradius and one vertex on the X-axis. The top profile at Z=120mm must be a regular hexagon with a 40mm circumradius, rotated 30 degrees counter-clockwise relative to the base. Connect these profiles to form a single solid loft. Save the result to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/twisted_pedestal.FCStd.
